degraded: External code review (external_review.py — GPT-5.4 + Gemini 3.1 Pro via OpenRouter): GPT-5.4 returned 3 actionable findings, all fixed (reasons capped at 3 in the renderer; the n/a-vs-zero test strengthened to count N/A score cells; the anchor/href test tightened from a tautological OR to concrete assertions). Gemini 3.1 Pro returned an incomplete/mangled response (file-list echo, no findings) — model-side cutoff. Coverage was not degraded: the internal opus code-reviewer traced the full security seam and found no blocking issues; its 6 low-severity items were applied.

The campaign sub-iterate spec (.shipwright/planning/iterate/campaigns/2026-07-03-shipwright-grade/sub-iterates/G3-html-report.md) exists only in the main working tree (untracked), so the external plan review + code review pointed at the main-tree copy.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 — single self-contained HTML document: no external-request surface (no <script>/external src|href/@import/url(http)/srcset/action/ping/meta-refresh), restrictive meta CSP, full <!doctype> document
AC2 — all sections render from the model: hero (grade+score+verdict+mode badge+measured count), dimension cards (anchor+provenance), funnel panel, top reasons, disclaimer, provenance stamp, CTA
AC3 — theme-aware (prefers-color-scheme dark) + responsive (viewport) + wide content scrolls in its own overflow-x container; long hostile tokens can't overflow (overflow-wrap)
AC4 — deterministic: same model → byte-identical scored content; the wall-clock appears exactly once, only in the footer

AC5 — escape-only: <script>/onerror/javascript:/bidi/ANSI/OSC-8 payloads fed through every text-bearing model field are rendered inert (HTML-escaped + control-stripped), proven both by substring checks AND a parser-based zero-live-DOM-node assertion; the terminal card is control-stripped
AC6 — snapshot tests for HTML + terminal card are stable across runs (byte-exact golden compare from one shared canonical model; UPDATE_GOLDEN to refresh intentionally)

AC7 — n/a dims render 'N/A' in their score cell (never a failing 0 or 0/denominator), are excluded from the score, and are listed in the 'controls Shipwright would light up' funnel; top reasons capped at 3
AC8 — ruff clean; both new modules ≤300 LOC
behaviors.evidence: uvx ruff@0.15.15 check plugins/shipwright-grade/ → All checks passed; html_report.py=250 LOC, _html_styles.py=139 LOC (both ≤300)
